mechanism_narrative: Elevated federal funds rates increase the discount rate for equity valuations, directly suppressing S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show positive direction in >65% of observations when FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.0%, or rolling Rank IC remains below 0.02 over 3 years.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending recession, causing investors to sell equities and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in >60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or unemployment spikes fail to predict equity drawdowns within 20 days.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer and business demand growth, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations in RSAFS and HOUST fail to predict positive 60-day returns in >55% of cases, or interaction term Rank IC < 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production reflects expanding manufacturing capacity and supply chain normalization, which supports corporate earnings and generates positive short-term S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases do not correlate with positive 5-day returns during supply normalization, or rolling predictive accuracy drops below 52% over 24 months.

mechanism_narrative: When consumer price inflation exceeds 300 index points while the federal funds rate remains above 4.0%, real discount rates compress equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX yields positive 20d returns in >60% of observations when both thresholds are breached, or threshold-based signal shows no statistical edge over baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent monthly growth in total nonfarm payrolls sustains household income and consumer spending, providing a structural floor for corporate revenues and generating positive S&P 500 returns over 60 days.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth fails to predict positive 60-day returns in >55% of cases, or rolling Rank IC remains below 0.02 across all market cycles.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent expansion in real GDP and retail sales confirms broad-based aggregate demand strength, which directly translates to higher corporate earnings and positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Positive co-movement in GDPC1 and RSAFS does not yield positive 20-day returns in >50% of triggered windows, or interaction effect is statistically insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous contraction in industrial production and housing starts signals a sharp deceleration in economic activity, triggering risk-off sentiment and negative S&P 500 returns over 5 days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO declines for 2 consecutive months and HOUST falls below 1300
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in >60% of instances when both supply thresholds are met, or the signal fails to predict drawdowns within the 5-day window.
